'''√j-p-f''' ('''kajapaf''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:debar|debar]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-p-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:debar|debar]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √j-p-f
|-
! Lemma
| kajapaf
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thijapaf || jijapaf || shijapaf || kijapaf
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthujapaf || jujujapaf || shushujapaf || kukujapaf
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thujapaf || jujapaf || shujapaf || kujapaf
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thujapaf || jujapaf || shujapaf || kujapaf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thejapaf || jejapaf || shejapaf || kejapaf
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothojapaf || jojojapaf || shoshojapaf || kokojapaf
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thojapaf || jojapaf || shojapaf || kojapaf
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thojapaf || jojapaf || shojapaf || kojapaf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || japaf || japaf || japaf || japaf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || japaf || japaf || japaf || japaf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || japaf || japaf || japaf || japaf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || japaf || japaf || japaf || japaf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thæjapaf || jæjapaf || shæjapaf || kæjapaf
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathajapaf || jajajapaf || shashajapaf || kakajapaf
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thajapaf || jajapaf || shajapaf || kajapaf
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thajapaf || jajapaf || shajapaf || kajapaf
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shajapaf
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshajapaf
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishajapaf
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shajapafnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshajapafnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishajapafnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shajapafshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshajapafnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishajapafshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shajapafro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshajapafnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishajapafro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shajapafmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshajapafnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishajapafmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shajapafsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshajapafnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishajapafsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shajapafng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshajapafnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishajapafng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shajapafya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshajapafnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishajapafya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shajapafyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshajapafnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishajapafyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shajapafnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshajapafnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishajapafnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shajapafnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshajapafnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishajapafnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shajapafnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshajapafnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishajapafnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shajapafshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshajapafnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishajapafshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shajapafshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshajapafnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishajapafshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shajapafshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshajapafnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishajapafshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shajapafronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshajapafnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishajapafronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shajapafroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshajapafnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishajapafroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shajapafromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshajapafnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishajapafromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shajapafmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshajapafnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishajapafmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shajapafmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshajapafnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishajapafmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shajapafmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshajapafnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishajapafmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d176386}}
